name: claude-raycast-notifier
title: AI Hook Notifier
description: Claude and Gemini events in Raycast with sounds and focused notifications.
author: lee_fulln

commands.name: manage-sounds
commands.title: Manage Hook Sounds
commands.description: Manage sounds, install health, and AI hook notifier setup

commands.name: setup-hooks
commands.title: Setup Hooks
commands.description: Check Claude and Gemini hook health and install hook config from Raycast

commands.name: notify-event
commands.title: Notify AI Event
commands.description: Render an actionable AI event and return you to the source app

commands.name: answer-claude-question
commands.title: Answer Claude Question
commands.description: Answer a Claude Code AskUserQuestion prompt and send the result back through hooks

commands.name: pending-claude-questions
commands.title: Pending Claude Questions
commands.description: Review and answer pending Claude Code questions from multiple sessions

preferences.name: stateFilePath
preferences.title: State File Path
preferences.description: Path to the shared Claude notifier state file

preferences.name: notifierRootPath
preferences.title: Notifier Root Path
preferences.description: Directory containing sound-library.json, sound-mappings.json, and managed sound assets
